title: Holidays and Traditions in English-Speaking Countries

tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B, C lub D.

items.question: On which date is Halloween celebrated?
What do children say when they knock on doors on Halloween?
Thanksgiving in the United States is celebrated in _______.
Which traditional food is served at an American Thanksgiving dinner?
What is Boxing Day (26th December) traditionally associated with in the UK?
options: B. Giving gifts or money to those in need
D. Buying a new box for presents

items.question: On St. Patrick's Day, people traditionally wear _______.
Guy Fawkes Night (Bonfire Night) is celebrated on 5th November in _______.
What do British people traditionally eat on Shrove Tuesday?
In the UK, what is traditionally hidden inside a Christmas pudding for good luck?
Which country celebrates its national day on 26th January?
